headline: WELL Health Record Revenue Spurs Clinic Growth And Wellstar Spin Out
summary: WELL Health Technologies (TSX:WELL) reported record annual revenue and a 52% increase in yearly revenue. The company expanded its clinic footprint and patient visits over the year. WELL Health advanced growth plans through new medical billing acquisitions. The company is preparing to spin out its Wellstar business as a separate entity. WELL Health Technologies, a digital health and clinic operator, operates at the intersection of primary care, virtual care, and health IT services. With more...
